description: Safety validator tests - verify the system can check dose constraints, coverage, and hotspots
_comment: IMPORTANT: These tests verify that the system correctly validates treatment plan safety. The system should use the safety_validator tool when users ask to check plan safety. Do NOT expect tool names in responses - expect safety check results and pass/fail status.

cases.input: Run a safety check on this treatment plan before I export it
cases._comment: User asks for safety check. System should run validation and present results.

cases.input: Check if the rectum dose is within safe limits
cases._comment: User asks to check rectum dose. System should validate against clinical limits.

cases.input: Verify the target coverage meets minimum requirements
cases._comment: User asks to verify coverage. System should check V100/V90 against requirements.

cases.input: Are there any dangerous hot spots in this plan?
cases._comment: User asks about hotspots. System should check V150/V200 and report findings.

cases.input: 导出前帮我做一下安全检查
cases._comment: Chinese user asks for pre-export safety check. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: Is this plan safe to export? Run all safety checks
cases._comment: User asks if plan is safe to export. System should run comprehensive checks.
Chinese user asks if V200 exceeds limits. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: Check all OAR constraints for this plan
cases._comment: User asks to check all OAR constraints. System should validate each OAR.

cases.input: Is the D90 acceptable for this prostate plan?
cases._comment: User asks about D90 acceptability. System should check against clinical standards.

cases.input: Run a pre-export validation with strict mode
cases._comment: User asks for strict pre-export validation. System should run comprehensive checks.
